name: EPG Suggester
description: Scans channels without EPG assignments and suggests the best matching EPG entry based on fuzzy channel name matching. Strips IPTV prefixes (US|, UK:), quality tags (HD, 4K), and noise words (VIP, backup) before scoring.
author: Jan Erik (custom)

fields.label: 🎯 Minimum Match Score (0-100)
fields.help_text: Only suggest EPG entries scoring at or above this threshold. Lower = more suggestions but less accurate. Start at 50, raise to 70+ once results look good.

fields.label: 📋 Max Suggestions Per Channel
fields.help_text: Maximum number of EPG candidates to show per unmatched channel (1-10).

fields.label: 📡 Limit to EPG Sources (optional)
fields.help_text: Comma-separated EPG source names to search within. Leave blank to search all sources.

fields.label: 📂 Limit to Channel Groups (optional)
fields.help_text: Comma-separated channel group names to scan. Leave blank to scan all groups.

fields.label: 🌍 Strip Geographic Prefixes (US|, UK:, USA: …)
fields.help_text: Remove country/region prefixes before matching so 'US| CNN' matches 'CNN'.

fields.label: 🎬 Strip Quality Tags (HD, SD, 4K, FHD, UHD…)
fields.help_text: Remove quality suffixes/prefixes before matching so 'CNN HD' matches 'CNN'.

fields.label: 🔧 Strip Misc Tags (vip, backup, +1…)
fields.help_text: Remove common IPTV noise words before matching.

fields.label: ⚡ Auto-Apply Best Match (use with caution!)
fields.help_text: When enabled, 'Apply Best Suggestions' will actually write EPG assignments. Always review the CSV export first!

fields.label: 🔒 Auto-Apply Min Score (0-100)
fields.help_text: Safety floor for auto-apply. Only matches scoring at or above this will be assigned. Only used when Auto-Apply is enabled.

actions.label: 🔍 Scan & Suggest EPG
actions.description: Scan all channels without EPG assigned and suggest the best matching EPG entries. Results shown as a report.

actions.label: 📤 Export Suggestions to CSV
actions.description: Run the suggestion scan and save full results to /data/exports/epg_suggester_TIMESTAMP.csv.

actions.label: ✅ Apply Best Suggestions
actions.description: Assign the top EPG suggestion to each unmatched channel (only those above the auto-apply threshold). Requires 'Auto-Apply' to be enabled. Review the CSV export first!

confirm.title: Apply EPG Suggestions?
confirm.message: This will assign EPG data to unmatched channels. Make sure you have reviewed the CSV export first. Continue?

actions.label: 📺 List Unmatched Channels
actions.description: Show a quick list of all channels that have no EPG assigned, without running the full suggestion engine.
